Adds a capability/content slide with structured narrative sections and optional visual support.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.PowerPointUtils
member.summary: PowerPoint utility methods based on the working open-xml-sdk-snippets implementation. CRITICAL: This class contains the exact initialization pattern required to prevent PowerPoint from showing a "repair" dialog. The order and relationship IDs used here are very specific and must not be changed.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions
member.summary: Configuration for flattening objects into key/value pairs where keys represent dotted paths.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.ExpandProperties
member.summary: Property names or dotted paths to expand (descend into) rather than treat as simple values.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.IncludeFullObjects
member.summary: When true, includes the original object under its path in addition to expanded fields.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.MaxDepth
member.summary: Maximum recursion depth when expanding nested objects.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.HeaderCase
member.summary: Header casing strategy for generated column names.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.HeaderPrefixTrimPaths
member.summary: Optional prefixes to trim from generated headers.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.Columns
member.summary: Optional explicit column whitelist (dotted paths).

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.Ignore
member.summary: Paths to exclude from output.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.IncludeProperties
member.summary: Optional convenience include list using property names or dotted paths. When specified, only matching columns are kept. A match occurs when the full dotted path matches or the last segment matches.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.ExcludeProperties
member.summary: Optional convenience exclude list using property names or dotted paths. A match occurs when the full dotted path matches or the last segment matches. This augments .

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.PinnedFirst
member.summary: Optional list of dotted paths to pin to the front of the generated column order when is not specified.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.PinnedLast
member.summary: Optional list of dotted paths to pin to the end of the generated column order.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.PropertyPriority
member.summary: Optional per-column priority ordering. Lower numbers appear earlier. Keys can be dotted paths or property names.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.NullPolicy
member.summary: How null values are represented.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.DefaultValues
member.summary: Per-path default values used when is selected.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.Formatters
member.summary: Per-path formatting delegates applied to values.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.CollectionMode
member.summary: How to handle collections.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.CollectionJoinWith
member.summary: Delimiter used when is selected.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.CollectionMapColumns
member.summary: Maps collection paths (e.g., "ScoreBreakdown") to dynamic columns using element properties. Example: map path "ScoreBreakdown" with KeyProperty="Name", ValueProperty="Value" to produce columns like "ScoreBreakdown.HasMX".

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.PinFirst(System.String[])
member.summary: Adds or appends to while preserving order and uniqueness.

member.summary: Adds or appends to while preserving order and uniqueness.

member.summary: Sets priority order 1..N for the provided paths (full path or property name).

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.Include(System.String[])
member.summary: Appends to while preserving uniqueness.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.Exclude(System.String[])
member.summary: Appends to while preserving uniqueness.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.PowerPoint.ObjectFlattenerOptions.Order(System.String[],System.String[],System.String[])
member.summary: One-call convenience: set pin-first, priority order, and pin-last. Any argument may be null; order is applied as PinFirst then PriorityOrder then PinLast.
